content:
<@&1440553558238953482> 
感谢大家热情的参与，我们收到了很多特别棒的作品！
经过了多轮评选后，诞生了最终的获奖名单：
✦ 奖励会在3月20日结束前发到大家的邮箱~
一等奖的头像框如果以前获取过，在点击“领奖”后会自动转化成500银芯和50个追念羽笔
如果奖励方面有问题也请联系我。
✦ 注意：个别投稿者提供的链接失效/无法正常打开，戈雅无法查看作品，也没办法进行联系，因此我只能发放参与奖，敬请谅解。
也请大家投稿前确认一下链接能否正常点开，非常感谢~
✦ 投稿作品在线文档已更新.

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thank you all for your enthusiastic participation! We have received a lot of amazing works!After multiple rounds of selection, the final list of winners has been determined~
✦ The rewards will arrive in your inbox by midnight on March 20th.
If the first prize avatar box has been obtained before, it will automatically convert into 500 Silver and 50 Remembrance Quills after clicking "Award"
If there are any issues with the rewards, please also contact me.
✦ Note: Some of the links provided by a few contributors have become invalid or are inaccessible. Goya was unable to view these works, and there's no way to make contact either. Therefore, Goya can only distribute participation awards for these entries. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
✦ The online document for the submitted work has been updated.
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mKHzSaL4D-874UTS5Dm8QqFtO-JtUn3Gdo9vRtGDnGE/edit?usp=sharing

embeds.title: Morimens UGC Appreciation | 投稿作品分享

content: 这个奖励别给我发了，我不要了，真的，能不能把这个图里面我的名字删了
我接受不了了，有点像是指着我的鼻子骂我不玩游戏
这个奖励我放弃，顺延给别人吧，把我名字删不了吧，真的求求了

谢谢守密人们对于二创/攻略活动的关注！在收到了一些反馈后，我们重新审视了本次活动的评奖标准以及评选流程，也思考了“什么样的内容才算优秀”这个问题。

除了专业性之外，所投稿内容的易读性、创意性、表现力、对新手玩家的友好程度等都是我们的评奖标准，但是我们没有把这些标准足够清晰地传达给大家，导致获奖结果在呈现上与各位的预期产生了偏差，这是我们工作上的疏忽。在评选过程中，虽然我们尽力秉持公正，但也必须承认仍然会有一定的视角局限性。

为了不让内容创作者们失望，我们会在后续活动中做出调整：
✦ 在活动前期公示清楚评奖标准。
✦ 让更多的团队成员参与评选，保证公平性。
感谢所有守密人的包容，我们会努力把未来的活动做得更周全、更透明。欢迎继续监督我们！

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thank you for your attention to the fan-made content/strategy guide event! After receiving some feedback, we have reviewed the judging criteria and selection process for this event, and also considered the question of "what constitutes excellent content."

Besides professionalism, readability, creativity, expressiveness, and accessibility for new players are all part of our judging criteria. However, we did not clearly communicate these criteria to everyone, resulting in a discrepancy between the presented winning results and your expectations. This was an oversight on our part. While we strived to maintain fairness during the selection process, we must acknowledge that certain limitations in perspective still existed.

To avoid disappointing content creators, we will make adjustments in future events:
✦ Clearly publicize the judging criteria before the event begins.
✦ Involve more team members in the selection process to ensure fairness.
Thank you for your understanding. We will strive to make future events more comprehensive and transparent. We welcome your continued feedback!
<@1131790839291596841> 事已至此，莫丝/阿拉克涅版本会有相关活动吗？徐版本就并未有二创/攻略活动，希望给个准信<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
請先確保每期創作徵集能跟得上新角色版本吧，否則連官方DC的討論度都冷冷清清，國內外的優秀創作也都寥寥無幾。或者得想想用其他方式解決創作者動力不足、討論度不夠的問題
